message.content:
@startuml
title TCPClient::connectToServer(string ipAddress, int port)

participant UC1 as "UC1"
participant TCPClient as "TCPClient"
participant clientStructure as "clientStructure"

note right of TCPClient
create a socket
socket_ = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0)
end note

opt [socket_ == -1]
    return -1 (socket create faild)
end opt

note right of clientStructure
object of sockaddr_in
end note

TCPClient -> clientStructure: clientStructure()
clientStructure.sin_family = AF_INET
clientStructure.sin_port = htons(port)

note right of TCPClient
linking ipAddress to clientstructure
using AF_INET standart
end note

TCPClient -> clientStructure: inet_pton(AF_INET, ipAddress.c_str(), &clientStructure.sin_addr)
TCPClient -> clientStructure: connectRes = connect(socket_, (sockaddr*)&clientStructure, sizeof(clientStructure))

opt [connectRes == -1]
    return -1 (faild to connect)
end opt

TCPClient -> clientStructure: (X)
TCPClient -> UC1: return 0 (connected)

@enduml
